title: juncus luciensis
intro: Juncus luciensis, also known as the Rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus luciensis include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Juncus luciensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried roots and rhizomes being the most commonly used herbal preparations.
